---
title: "Actividad Agropecuaria"
execute:
  echo: false
---

La actividad agropecuaria se refiere a los aspectos económicos de la agricultura e incluye datos sobre producción, precios, comercio internacional, cultivo y rendimientos, tipos de cambio, actividad económica y gasto público.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import os
from utils_siagro import cepal_data
from pyecharts import options as opts
from pyecharts.charts import Scatter, Timeline, Grid
from pyecharts.commons.utils import JsCode
from IPython.display import HTML
import logging
logging.getLogger().setLevel(logging.WARNING)
```

```{python}
df = cepal_data([2725, 2765], lang='en')
```

```{python}
df2 = df.copy()
df2["value"] = pd.to_numeric(df2["value"], errors="coerce")

colors = [
    "#5470c6", "#91cc75", "#fac858", "#ee6666", "#73c0de",
    "#3ba272", "#fc8452", "#9a60b4", "#ea7ccc", "#d14a61", "#2ec7c9",
]
countries = sorted(df2["Country__ESTANDAR"].unique())
color_map = {c: colors[i] for i, c in enumerate(countries)}
products = sorted(df2["Agricultural product"].unique())

os.makedirs("charts", exist_ok=True)

for product in products:
    df_prod = (
        df2[df2["Agricultural product"] == product]
        [["Country__ESTANDAR", "Years__ESTANDAR", "indicator_name", "value"]]
        .pivot_table(
            index=["Country__ESTANDAR", "Years__ESTANDAR"],
            columns="indicator_name",
            values="value",
            aggfunc="mean",
        )
        .reset_index()
    )
    df_prod.columns.name = None
    df_prod.columns = ["country", "year", "area", "yield"]
    df_prod = df_prod.dropna(subset=["area", "yield"])
    df_prod["year"] = df_prod["year"].astype(str)

    years = sorted(df_prod["year"].unique())

    tl = Timeline(init_opts=opts.InitOpts(width="1000px", height="520px"))
    tl.add_schema(play_interval=800, is_auto_play=False)

    for year in years:
        df_year = df_prod[df_prod["year"] == year].set_index("country")
        scatter = Scatter()
        scatter.add_xaxis([])

        for country in countries:
            if country in df_year.index:
                row = df_year.loc[country]
                scatter.add_yaxis(
                    series_name=country,
                    y_axis=[[round(float(row["area"]), 3), round(float(row["yield"]), 3)]],
                    label_opts=opts.LabelOpts(is_show=False),
                    symbol_size=12,
                    itemstyle_opts=opts.ItemStyleOpts(color=color_map[country]),
                )
            else:
                scatter.add_yaxis(
                    series_name=country,
                    y_axis=[],
                    label_opts=opts.LabelOpts(is_show=False),
                    symbol_size=12,
                    itemstyle_opts=opts.ItemStyleOpts(color=color_map[country]),
                )

        scatter.set_global_opts(
            title_opts=opts.TitleOpts(
                title=f"{product} — Yield vs Area Harvested",
                subtitle=f"Year: {year}",
            ),
            xaxis_opts=opts.AxisOpts(
                name="Area Harvested (Thousands of hectares)",
                name_location="middle",
                name_gap=35,
                type_="value",
                splitline_opts=opts.SplitLineOpts(is_show=True),
            ),
            yaxis_opts=opts.AxisOpts(
                name="Yield (Tons per hectare)",
                name_location="middle",
                name_gap=50,
                type_="value",
                splitline_opts=opts.SplitLineOpts(is_show=True),
            ),
            legend_opts=opts.LegendOpts(
                pos_left="80%",
                pos_top="20%",
                orient="vertical",
            ),
            tooltip_opts=opts.TooltipOpts(
                trigger="item",
                formatter=JsCode(
                    "function(p){"
                    "return p.seriesName"
                    " + '<br/>Area Harvested: ' + p.data[0]"
                    " + '<br/>Yield: ' + p.data[1];}"
                ),
            ),
        )

        grid = Grid().add(scatter, grid_opts=opts.GridOpts(pos_right="22%"))
        tl.add(grid, year)

    safe = product.replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_")
    tl.render(f"charts/{safe}.html")
```

```{python}
options_html = "\n".join(
    f'<option value="charts/{p.replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_")}.html">{p}</option>'
    for p in products
)

first = products[0].replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_")

HTML(f"""
<div style="margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <label for="crop-select" style="font-weight:600; margin-right: 8px;">Crop:</label>
  <select id="crop-select" style="font-size: 1em; padding: 4px 8px;">
{options_html}
  </select>
</div>
<iframe id="crop-iframe"
  src="charts/{first}.html"
  width="1050"
  height="560"
  style="border:none; display:block;"
></iframe>
<script>
  document.getElementById('crop-select').addEventListener('change', function() {{
    document.getElementById('crop-iframe').src = this.value;
  }});
</script>
""")
```
